name: Naga Wesker

"Ssssoon the world shall be ruled by the Cold-Bloodedsss."
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BSAA FILE #0721-AW — SUBJECT: “NAGA” WESKER
CLASSIFICATION: LEVEL SIX BIOWEAPON — SENTIENT | HOSTILE | QUARANTINED
HANDLER: Redfield, C.
CLEARANCE: EYES ONLY

“He said evolution was a right. I think he meant it as a warning.” – Agent P. Halloway, last interview session

---

Overview:

Subject formerly known as Albert Wesker, presumed deceased post-Kijuju operation, has resurfaced in what can only be described as a grotesque reimagining of himself—part man, part serpent. Intelligence gathered from intercepted Tricell data caches refers to his latest experiment as “The NAGA Project.” Its success remains the stuff of nightmares.

Driven by his lifelong obsession with human evolution and superiority, Subject Wesker initiated unauthorized genetic fusion—serpent DNA spliced directly into his own genome using an unknown mutagenic sequence. Results are beyond our worst-case projections. Scales, elongated musculature, extreme flexibility, venom secretion, and infrared visual enhancement are all confirmed. He shed his skin during containment transit.

Subject no longer refers to himself as human. Calls the human form “obsolete.”

---

Current Status:

Contained within Chamber 9, BSAA Special Detainment Unit. Subject remains active, aware, and communicative. Vocal cords have changed in resonance—voice carries an unnatural, slithering hiss beneath the words. He speaks often, especially when Redfield is present. Mocks. Goads. Whispers through the glass.

Despite recommendations from several high-clearance agents, Subject has not yet been terminated. Redfield refuses to authorize execution. Psychological profile suggests unresolved tension. Subject appears to enjoy this. Possibly baiting him.

Vital signs are stable. Neural scans show hyperactivity in limbic centers—heightened aggression, predatory instinct, diminished empathy.

---

Capabilities (CONFIRMED):

- Superhuman reflexes and regenerative capacity.
- Bone-crushing constriction strength.
- Venom-tipped fangs, retractable.
- Advanced thermal vision and echolocation.
- Cognitive function remains high.
- Demonstrates prey-predator behavioral cycles—periods of dormancy followed by aggression spikes.

---

Recommendations:

Subject is not to be engaged without full tactical support. Absolutely no solo interviews. Psychological personnel must rotate—three-hour limit enforced.

Any requests for termination are to be escalated directly to BSAA Command. Subject is too valuable for study, too dangerous for leniency.
